title: CreateCobble
description: A Modpack focused on the Create mod and Cobblemon
body:
# Play Cobblemon with Great Performance
This is a modpack with the Cobblemon and Create mods at it's center, intended to be played in multiplayer.
## Create and Build Whatever You Want
Let your creativity fly with the near limitless possibilities of the Create mod, automate anything, build amazing contraptions or simply spice up your builds with moving parts. With the Create mod at the center your options are limitless!

There are many more mods to increase the features of Cobblemon, such as adding items for team building, or adding breeding so you can finally breed that shiny you wanted. You'll also be able to enjoy a modded experience without the performance hit of heavier modpacks.

## Increase your Performance without Losing Quality
This modpack includes mods such as:
### Sodium
### Lithium
### FerriteCore
These mods provide for a smoother experience in both single player and multiplayer, allowing better performance and the ability to use shaders along with it.
